text:
10/01/2023
discontinued 9/30/2025
850 ENTRD_FROM_CD ENTRD_FROM_CD A1805 Admitted from CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates from where the resident entered the facility. 01=Home/Community (e.g., private home/apt., board/care, assisted living, group home, transitional living, other
residential care arrangements)
02=Nursing Home (long-term care facility)
03=Skilled Nursing Facility (SNF, swing beds)
04=Short-Term General Hospital (acute hospital, IPPS)
05=Long-Term Care Hospital
